subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere servant of the Blessed Beauty! The letter thou didst write from Zanjan hath been received. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال مبارک نامه ایکه از زنجان مرقوم نموده بودی وصول یافت الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @call to action, @stories; anecdotes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
